name: dxr-mcp-server
description: Search, classify, and redact sensitive data across your enterprise with Data X-Ray
long_description: Connect Claude to your Data X-Ray instance to search indexed files, view sensitivity classifications, retrieve file content, and get privacy-safe redacted versions of documents. Supports KQL queries for powerful file filtering across enterprise-scale deployments.

api_url.title: Data X-Ray URL
api_url.description: Base URL of your Data X-Ray instance (e.g. https://dxr.yourcompany.com)

api_token.title: API Token
api_token.description: Bearer token for Data X-Ray API authentication. Get this from your DXR administrator.

skip_ssl_verify.title: Skip SSL Verification
skip_ssl_verify.description: Disable SSL certificate verification (only for development environments with self-signed certificates)

tools.name: list_file_metadata
tools.description: Search and list files indexed in Data X-Ray with KQL filtering

tools.name: get_file_metadata_details
tools.description: Get complete metadata for specific files including classifications

tools.name: get_file_redacted_text
tools.description: Get privacy-safe redacted versions of documents

tools.name: get_classifications
tools.description: List all sensitivity classifications and annotators
